title: Prestwick Airport to remain with government as bidder pulls out

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Prestwick Airport has been owned by the Scottish government since 2013.

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: Prestwick Airport remains in public hands as bidder pulls out Prestwick Airport has been owned by the Scottish government since 2013

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: Prestwick Airport will remain in public ownership after the preferred bidder for its sale pulled out of the running. A commercial deal had been negotiated between the Scottish government and the bidder - who remains anonymous - earlier this year.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Prestwick Airport to remain with government as bidder pulls out
